tp:taxonomyPackage.tp:name: VSME XBRL Taxonomy November 2025
tp:taxonomyPackage.tp:description: XBRL Taxonomy reflecting the Voluntary Sustainability Reporting Standards for non-listed SMEs (VSME) published as European Commission Recommendation (EU) 2025/1710 of 30 July 2025.

tp:entryPoint.tp:name: VSME All reporting entry point
tp:entryPoint.tp:description: To be used for reporting, includes elements, presentation, definition and calculation linkbases.
